---
title: "Le musée français: Recueil complet des tableaux statues et bas-reliefs qui composent la collection nationale"
---

## Le musée français: Recueil complet des tableaux statues et bas-reliefs qui composent la collection nationale

**Author:** S. C. Croze Magnan
**Date:** 1803-1809
**Imprint:** Paris: Hernan

### Notes

Continued by <i>Le musée royale</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
